pi_items.source: Verified against setup_task.sh TARGET_FILE and task description. .flipchart is confirmed as official ActivInspire file extension.
Verified against setup_task.sh where directory is created and TARGET_FILE is set to this exact path.
Task description explicitly states '3-page science lesson flipchart'. Verifier (line 60) checks for exactly 3 pages.

Task description specifies 'at least 6 organisms: Grass, Grasshopper, Frog, Snake, Hawk, and Fungi'. All are real organisms found in grassland food webs. Verified against scientific literature on grassland ecosystems.
Task description states 'at least 5 directional arrows showing energy flow'. Export script counts arrow/line elements on Page 2.
Task description specifies 'at least 3 stacked shapes' for Energy Pyramid. Verifier checks pyramid_shape_count >= 3.

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic 3-page ActivInspire flipchart document about a grassland food web. Page 1 contains introduction text defining producers, consumers, and decomposers. Page 2 displays a food web diagram with six organisms (Grass, Grasshopper, Frog, Snake, Hawk, Fungi) connected by at least 5 directional arrows representing energy flow. Page 3 shows an energy pyramid with at least 3 labeled trophic levels. All organisms are real species appropriate for grassland ecosystems. The file is saved as grassland_food_web.flipchart in /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/. All metadata claims are consistent with the task description and implementation.
